allow: Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@178.104.174.24 "echo OK; uname -a; lsb_release -a; free -h; df -h /; nproc")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@178.104.174.24 "set -e; if ! swapon --show | grep -q /swapfile; then fallocate -l 2G /swapfile && chmod 600 /swapfile && mkswap /swapfile && swapon /swapfile && echo '/swapfile none swap sw 0 0' >> /etc/fstab; fi; free -h | grep -i swap")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@178.104.174.24 "DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get update -qq && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get upgrade -yq -o Dpkg::Options::='--force-confdef' -o Dpkg::Options::='--force-confold' 2>&1 | tail -5")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@178.104.174.24 "install -d -m 0755 /etc/apt/keyrings && curl -fsSL https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/microsoft.gpg && echo 'deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/microsoft.gpg] https://packages.microsoft.com/repos/code stable main' > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/vscode.list && apt-get update -qq 2>&1 | tail -3 && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -yq code 2>&1 | tail -3 && code --version --no-sandbox --user-data-dir=/tmp/check 2>&1 | head -3")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@178.104.174.24 "sudo -u team -H code --install-extension anthropic.claude-code 2>&1 | tail -10")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@178.104.174.24 "sudo -u team -H code --list-extensions --show-versions 2>&1; echo ---; ls /usr/share/applications/code.desktop; free -h")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@178.104.174.24 "curl -fsSL https://packages.mozilla.org/apt/repo-signing-key.gpg | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/packages.mozilla.org.gpg && echo 'deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/packages.mozilla.org.gpg] https://packages.mozilla.org/apt mozilla main' > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/mozilla.list && printf 'Package: *\\nPin: origin packages.mozilla.org\\nPin-Priority: 1000\\n' > /etc/apt/preferences.d/mozilla && apt-get update -qq 2>&1 | tail -3 && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -yq firefox 2>&1 | tail -3 && firefox --version")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@178.104.174.24 "sudo -u team -H xdg-settings set default-web-browser firefox.desktop 2>&1; ls /usr/share/applications/firefox.desktop; free -h")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@178.104.174.24 "systemctl restart tigervncserver@:1.service && sleep 3 && systemctl is-active tigervncserver@:1.service && sudo -u team -H pgrep -af autocutsel")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 team@178.104.174.24 "du -sh ~/oddzilla/Oddin && find ~/oddzilla/Oddin -type f | wc -l && ls ~/oddzilla/Oddin/")
